scripts.test:: bun run test:web && bun run test:db
scripts.test:all: bun run test:web && bun run test:db && bun run test:e2e
scripts.test:db: bash -lc 'if command -v nix-shell >/dev/null 2>&1; then nix-shell --run "uv run --extra test pytest tests/python"; else uv run --extra test pytest tests/python; fi'
scripts.test:e2e: nix-shell --run 'cd apps/web && PLAYWRIGHT_WEB_SERVER=1 bun run test:e2e'
scripts.test:e2e:headed: nix-shell --run 'cd apps/web && PLAYWRIGHT_WEB_SERVER=1 bun run test:e2e:headed'
